title: Rogue Guns
description: An Expansion to Just Enough Guns
body:
![Rogue Guns Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8161bfc939efe2609c52cc0f935f2147395d5f8b.png)

Rogue Guns aims to Expand Just Enough Guns adding even more Firearms and Features fitting in Minecraft's Style!

This Mod was very Fun to make, It'll be receiving lots of Updates!
You are encouraged to use it in your Modpack!

Dependencies:
Just Enough Guns is Required!

Framework is needed for 1.18.2 and Above!

 

Feedback:
You can give Feedback, Report bugs, and suggest ideas on Rogue Guns in my Discord: https://discord.gg/TKNmcH7M5e

Keep in mind this Mod will be very Buggy and is still very early on in Development! Many more updates to come!

Credits:
If It weren't for MigaMi, I wouldn't be where I am in Modding Currently, I wouldn't even be writing this. He helped me so much, thanks Miga
